boundary.description: This session requested isolation while the main checkout still has uncommitted changes. Choose how to continue.
boundary.title: Move uncommitted changes?
chat.isolateTooltip: Run in an isolated git worktree
chrome.cleanupWarning: This affects the isolated git checkout. Other sessions sharing the same environment may lose their execution root.
chrome.siblingDescription: Other sessions may still use this isolated checkout.
missing.description: The git worktree for this session is missing or out of sync. Choose how to recover before continuing.
missing.title: Isolated checkout unavailable
newChat.description: This issue already has isolated sessions. Pick whether to stay on main, continue in an existing environment, or create a new one.
newChat.title: Choose where to start
